item.title: Showcase Impact, Not Years! 🌟 • Identify a key skill in job descriptions. • Gather data/examples of your impact using this skill. • Create a concise impact statement: Use: “I achieved X% by Y.” • Update your resume and LinkedIn with this impact. • Prepare to discuss these achievements in interviews. How can you demonstrate your impact in your current or past roles? #jobsearch #resume #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Showcase Impact, Not Years! 🌟 • Identify a key skill in job descriptions. • Gather data/examples of your impact using this skill. • Create a concise impact statement: Use: “I achieved X% by Y.” • Update your resume and LinkedIn with this impact. • Prepare to discuss these achievements in interviews. How can you demonstrate your impact in your current or past roles? #jobsearch #resume #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
